name: Improper Handling of Undefined Values
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when a value is not defined or supported for the associated parameter, field, or argument. Processing undefined values without validation can lead to null pointer dereferences, crashes, or logic errors.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (parameters with potentially undefined or unsupported values) flowing to TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes (business logic, method calls) without a CONTROL mediator (defined-value check, supported-value validation) that verifies the value is defined and within the expected domain before processing.
